entry.title: Re: Flexible Work flow for purchase order
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

In order to get detailed steps about how to configure flexible workflow for purchase orders please, check the following SAP help: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/af9ef57f504840d2b81be8667206d485/c1acc9fa4c2041be952bb7c1c8f902ae.html

 Thanks and regards, 

Maria

SAP Technical Support

entry.title: Re: SAP ASE HADR - database replication limit
entry.content:
To answer your 2 questions:

  • Cross database/cross server XA transactions are not supported.  Only XA transactions involving tables in a database added to HADR are supported.  All committed actions, including those performed by XA transactions executed across multiple SAP ASE databases, will be replicated for databases on the active ASE instance that are part of HADR.    
  • XA support is only needed between primary and companion (active/standby).  As previously mentioned, the 3rd-node (DR) does not participate as a failover target.

There are 3 synchronization modes that can be used:

  • sync
  • async
  • nearsync

HADR replication writes to the SPQ and the modes above dictate how the transaction is first captured to the SPQ of the active SRS.  From there, application to the standby and DR is performed asynchronously, regardless of the mode selected.

Descriptions of these modes can be found at sap_update_replication synchronization_mode | SAP Help Portal.  'sync' is the default for primary (active) and companion (standby).  'async' is the default for the 3rd-node DR.

Chris

entry.title: Re: Value of custom fields not shown in list FAGLB03
entry.content: If the structure and field catalog are okay, look for the BadI implementing class (e.g. set a break-point)

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration : B2B - Restart/Retry Messages - B2B Monitor
entry.content:
Hello RJ,
Thanks for this post although I did all the steps mentioned and I can successfully check the endpoint in the BTP Cockpit it isn't working for me. I am not able to restart or retry one single message I only get the possibility to cancel the message(s) one by one.
If I select all failed messages I see the restart/retry actions and after having given a reason for the action chosen I get the system's reply that reprocessing of the messages will take a moment but nothing happened no trace of any reprocessing can be found in the B2B scenarios monitor.

The version of the Cloud Integration - Trading Partner Management V2 being used is 2.5.1 released by SAP on March, 26th 2025. I wonder if anybody else experience the same issue(s) with this feature?

Regards,
Mathias

entry.title: SAP Datasphere - Connection couldn’t be established.
entry.content:
Good day,

I trust you are all well.

I am experiencing an issue when trying to connect to an Azure Synapse SQL Database via Cloud Connector.

The Azure Synapse SQL Server hostname is accessible via Cloud Connector however I get the below error when creating the Connection on SAP Datasphere:

Connection "*** Azure Synapse DB" couldn’t be established. - Data flows can’t be used because of errors in the connection. - Replication flows can’t be used because of errors in the connection. - Remote tables are disabled.
Data Flows: Cause: Communication with DS backend was unexpectedly closed
Replication Flows: Cause: Communication with DS backend was unexpectedly closed

Regards,

Brandon

entry.title: Re: Consume deployed CAP Service from locally running CAP...
entry.content:
For me it's working to use a destination in local dev. env. 

be sure to bind -2 <dest-service-inst> and <xsuaa-inst>( and maybe conn. service instance)

and 

configure a (development) approuter to authenticate against the xsuaa.

entry.title: Limitation on storage locations
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any limitation on how many storage location could be created for a plant? Would it be possible to create 2.000 storage locations within one plant?

Regards,

Vanessa

entry.title: Re: So10 Underline single word for Adobe Forms
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

 

Yes, you can underline specific words from an SO10 text in SAP Adobe Forms - but there are a few key steps you need to follow because standard SO10 (Standard Text) does not directly support rich text (like underlining) unless you handle it explicitly.

 

Option 1: Use HTML Markup in SO10 and Bind it to a Rich Text Field in Adobe Forms

1. Maintain SO10 Text with Inline HTML Markup:

In transaction SO10, when maintaining the standard text, you can insert basic HTML-like tags manually.

Example:

html

CopierModifier

This is a <u>very important</u> point to note.

2. In Adobe Lifecycle Designer:

    • Use a Rich Text Field (not a plain text field).
    • In the Field tab, bind the field to the SO10 text content (via the text module interface or program context).
    • In the Value pattern, make sure the binding supports XHTML

3. In ABAP: When fetching the SO10 text, make sure it’s passed through READ_TEXT and joined as a single string with the tags intact.

 

DATA: lt_lines TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tline,

      lv_text  TYPE string.

 

CALL FUNCTION 'READ_TEXT'

  EXPORTING

    id       = 'ST'

    language = sy-langu

    name     = 'Z_MY_SO10_TEXT'

    object   = 'TEXT'

  TABLES

    lines    = lt_lines.

 

LOOP AT lt_lines INTO DATA(ls_line).

  CONCATENATE lv_text ls_line-tdline INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY space.

ENDLOOP.

 

* Pass lv_text to Adobe Form interface parameter

4. Ensure Rich Text Option Is Enabled in Form:

    • In the Adobe form field → Object > Field > Field Type: Rich Text.
    • Under Value tab, make sure formatting is set to XHTML.

 

Option 2: Alternative – Inline Formatting via Smart Styles

If you don’t want to embed HTML manually, another approach is to:

  • Split the text programmatically into chunks.
  • Create separate text elements or fragments and apply formatting (like underlining) selectively in the form using Adobe Designer. This is more work but gives cleaner control.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: SAP Datasphere: Analytic Model - Variable - Option "Dynamic Default" doesn't fill the prompt anymore
entry.content:
Hi,

just 2-3 weeks ago, my "dynamic default"-variables were filling the prompts (with values i have expected). Now, these variables don't fill the prompt anymore.

The last two comments of the following blog post express the same issue:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/datasphere-populating-dynamic-default-values-in-analytical-model-variables/ba-p/14009854

Anyone else who got this problem?

entry.title: Unable to create a C1 release contract on CDS Table Function
entry.content:
To access certain data, we have implemented a CDS Table Function in a Standard ABAP/Tier 2 package, which we would then need to be consumed by a Tier 1/Cloud for ABAP CDS View.

(We are following the recommendation here: Creating Tier 2 Cloud APIs).

However, in ADT the options to add a C1 or C2 release contract are greyed out / unavailable for the CDS Table Function:

Also, when trying to add a C0 release contract, it gives this message: "C0 release is not supported for entity type F.":

Trying to consume the CDS Table Function in a Tier 1 CDS View is impossible, and also results in an error (presumably until we can add a C1 release contract).

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Aggregate Values on a dynamic Date
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m looking for a way to aggregate values based on a dynamic date. For example:

Values from 202501 to 202503 should be aggregated to a date that’s twelve months ahead of the current date, resulting in something like:

202501–202503 → 202604

Has anyone tackled something similar or have suggestions on how to approach this?

Looking forward to your thoughts!

BR,

Ismail

entry.title: Re: Reset ANLC to rebuild a depreciation area - S/4 HANA...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

You're absolutely right to avoid OABL in a productive system, especially when the goal is not to delete an entire depreciation area but only clean/reset values in that area for multiple assets.

 

Here is some option you can try :

1. Use Transaction AOBJ to Create a Custom Worklist

Use the standard mass change framework for assets:

  • Go to transaction AOBJ
  • Create a new variant for Mass Change on depreciation data
  • Assign the field group for depreciation areas
  • Use mass change transaction AR01 or call the function module AM_ASSET_MASS_CHANGE to:
    • Update the parameters of depreciation area 51 to set acquisition = 0, etc.

Note: This doesn’t delete historical values but updates fields. For full cleanups, see point 3.

 

2. Write a Custom ABAP Report Using BAPI or BADI

You can use the following standard function modules:

  • BAPI_FIXEDASSET_CHANGE
  • BAPI_FIXEDASSET_OVRTAKE_CREATE
  • BAPI_FIXEDASSET_OVRTAKE_CHANGE

To programmatically:

  • Loop through the list of 2000 assets
  • Reset values of area 51 (Acquisition = 0, APC = 0, etc.)
  • Ensure the depreciation key is removed or set to a “no depreciation” type

This ensures that the area stays, but has no values and no future postings.

 

3. Technical Table Reset (Last Resort - Under SAP Supervision)

If values still appear in:

  • ANEP (planned acquisition)
  • ANLC (cumulative values)

And you can't remove them via above methods, then:

  • Use a custom ABAP report (authorized in a controlled test environment first)
  • Based on your list of assets, delete ANLC/ANEP entries for area 51
  • This is not standard-supported and must be validated with SAP via OSS beforehand

This can be scripted with SQL or Open SQL in ABAP, with asset list, filtering AFAPL = 51.

ABAP example structure:

DELETE FROM anlc WHERE bukrs = 'XXXX' AND anln1 = 'XXXXX' AND afabe = '51'.

DELETE FROM anep WHERE bukrs = 'XXXX' AND anln1 = 'XXXXX' AND afabe = '51'.

But again: SAP strongly recommends against this without a ticket, and you’ll lose traceability.

 

I hope this will help you with those further details.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Learning LMS user data import file on...
entry.content: Since EC is within Platform there is always the use of the employee export & live profile export as the recommended option or the Integration Center export, but since the LMS resides on a different application stack & server & DB, API options would not be suitable for large data syncs between them but rather just for single user data changes or creations within platform.

entry.title: Integration of Suppliers from SAP ERP (On-premise) to SAP Ariba contracts management
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are on an SAP private cloud landscape and we are in the process of implementing SAP Ariba contract management solution. There are a couple of master data objects that we are trying to import to Ariba contracts from our ERP, the initial load works as expected using the data import/export options in the Ariba portal. Are there any built-in solutions for delta loads that can be scheduled(addition of a new supplier in ERP automatically syncs with Ariba). We have explored the "ARBCIG_MASTER_DATA_EXPORT' report and this report does not let us select supplier as an option for SAP Ariba sourcing & contracts but it works for SAP Ariba procurement solutions.

Any inputs on this integration setup is highly appreciated.

Thanks

Arun

SAP Ariba Contracts SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration with Concur Solutions becomes available for Concur Standard
entry.content: Yes, for the time being, it's the old travel allowance service.

entry.title: Re: When Job Requisition is in filled state it is not sho...
entry.content: This is the expected behavior as of now. Once a job requisition is closed, it will no longer be displayed against the position. The reason is that when a job requisition is closed or canceled without completing the hiring process, the system should ideally allow the creation of a new requisition for the same position. The same applies when a requisition is closed with the status "Filled" after completing the hiring in EC. In such cases, you should have a rule configured in EC: if the position is marked as occupied (which only happens once the candidate is hired in EC), then the system should not allow the creation of a new requisition against that position.

entry.title: Re: Joule – End-to-End Setup Guide (for all Line of Business) Unified Approach
entry.content:
Hi @nageshcaparthy ,

I have a set of query:

I'm exploring the possibility of integrating SAP Joule with SAP Datasphere — either via direct service availability or custom architecture. Specifically, I’m interested in understanding:

1.) Is SAP Joule currently accessible as a standalone service on SAP BTP or only embedded within specific SAP applications?

2.) Are there any supported or recommended approaches for using Joule’s capabilities in conjunction with SAP Datasphere?

3.) Does the roadmap include broader availability of Joule APIs or SDKs that developers could leverage for custom integrations?

I’d appreciate any guidance, documentation links, or experience others have had exploring this kind of setup.

Thanks in advance!

Joule SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Re: How to disable access to job requisition to the hirin...
entry.content:
You can achieve this using business rules. In the Position Management Recruiting Integration rule, you can define logic such as: if the logged-in user (e.g., the manager) has a business unit that matches the business unit on the position, then the requisition should be created. Otherwise, the system should display an error message.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: IAS - SAC Role Maping
entry.content:
Hi @tskwin @JBARLOW 

Below blog is descirbed in SAML Mapping as mentioned by @JBARLOW 

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-commissions-embedded-analytics-teams/ba-p/13566430

entry.title: Re: Limitation on storage locations
entry.content:
Hello @VanessaM 

Storage location ID is 4 chars long. So you can created 34^4 = 1,336,336 storage locations per plant. I'm not aware of any other limitations. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: The SAP BW Data Product Generator for SAP Business Data Cloud

entry.title: Exploring SAP Joule Integration Options with SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm exploring the possibility of integrating SAP Joule with SAP Datasphere — either via direct service availability or custom architecture.

Specifically, I’m interested in understanding:

  • Is SAP Joule currently accessible as a standalone service on SAP BTP or only embedded within specific SAP applications?

  • Are there any supported or recommended approaches for using Joule’s capabilities in conjunction with SAP Datasphere?

  • Does the roadmap include broader availability of Joule APIs or SDKs that developers could leverage for custom integrations?

I’d appreciate any guidance, documentation links, or experience others have had exploring this kind of setup.

Thanks in advance!

Joule SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Cloud ALM Landscape Management Import not executing
entry.content:
This is probably not the correct board for my question, but can someone shed light on the following message in Cloud ALM?

I see this in Landscape Management:
"The LIS import is still running in the background. Please wait until the import is completed."

But in Health Monitoring for Cloud ALM, I see this message:

"The daily SLIS import on 2025-04-13T10:07:23Z couldnt be executed."

Where can I see the logs as I am sure this is not in SLG1 in the BW or ECC/S4 systems. Can anyone help? I did see something (but can no longer find it) about an API not having proper access, but how do i prove that or remediate that?

entry.title: S/4 HANA Public CLoud TM- "Assignment of FU not possible since system not in lead "
entry.content:
Hello Team,

we have only one S/4 HANA Public cloud system for Luxembourg . there is no external System. I created Sales order in S/4 hana Public cloud and  FU is created. Now when assgnining  FU to FO manually , system is giving below error.

Only the below config  exists in our system. There is no config node also to define my own FUBR rules.

Even if i use Cockpit, still the same error would occur but iam not able to use cockpit since standard page layouts are missing in our system and an OSS message is rasied for that.

But for this issue, what is the solution. Iam using shipping condition 06- which is TM internal Planning. Iam exceuting scope item 6W2 but above FU error is preventing to continue.

rgds

sachin

entry.title: Re: Manage Supplier Quotations Custom Field/Logic
entry.content:
Hi

I noticed you are doing a check if it is initial - i am not sure if it will be initial if it is either checked or not checked. So this is something to consider

I would recommend to add a trace message in the if statement that prints "got here" for example to the trace log.

Also, there is a Test button in the custom logic code editor - this will allow you to set some values in the incoming values and click Test then check the values in outgoing parameters. This is very useful to validate your logic.

Please give those both a shot and let us know how it goes

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: 📢 SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit - Direct Transfer for Public Cloud - (Early adapter Program)
entry.content:
Hi @Dsk.

Thank you for your article. I notice the Direct Transfer is on GA since 2402. Is this option also available for migration from S/HANA OP (instead of ECC) to S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition? Thanks!

Regards,
Gerard

entry.title: Re: Can we make a Replacement field in Job Requisition as...
entry.content:
The only option I see is to create this as an object field, where in the MDF object, the external code is defined as a User field.

To maintain data for this object, there are two approaches:

  1. Perform a one-time upload of user data.

  2. Configure edit permissions for the object field on the requisition, so that users can add entries on the fly using the plus icon. Once a user is added, they can then be selected on the requisition.

Additionally, since the external code in EC is of type User, the system will restrict selection to only active users.

 

 

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Unable to execute Adaptation Project from WebIde
entry.content:
1. Create  an Adaptation project in WebIde for Standard Application – Manage Purchase Requisition Professional – F2229 in Safe/Advanced mode.
  2. Right click on the project . Choose Run -> Run flpSandbox.html or Run as Web Application or any other option.
  3. Application does not load. Only a blank page appears.

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide: Extracting Pegging Data with the New SAP IBP API
entry.content:
Good afternoon, sorry for the delay in replying.

This is quite a strange error. Would it be possible for you to run the test in another version to see if the same error occurs?

Also, could you try testing with an underscore before BASELINE, like "_BASELINE", and see if the issue persists?

entry.title: Re: Can you trigger a Business rule for a candidate based...
entry.content:
As of now, there is no standard flag available in the rule configuration that allows you to trigger a business rule based on whether the candidate is external. To achieve this, you first need to update the external/internal candidate flag in a custom field via integration. You can refer to the link provided for guidance on updating this custom field through integration. Once the data is updated via integration, you can then trigger your business rule based on the value stored in the custom field.

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-q-a/internal-external-candidate/qaq-p/14068749

 

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: Analytic Model - Variable - Option "Dynamic Default" doesn't fill the
entry.content:
Hi,

I have tried one week before similar to Blog  , dymaic values still working for me, I don't see any issue.

Kind regards

Hari

entry.title: (PT) ATCUD and Digital signature in SOAP API
entry.content:
Hello,

For sending billing documents in Portugal market, we are considering using SOAP API “CO_EDI_INVOICE_REQUEST_OUT” in S/4 (https://api.sap.com/api/CO_EDI_INVOICE_REQUEST_OUT/resource).

In Portugal it is mandatory to communicate the Digital Signature information with the billing document, in the SOAP API it is done with the following segments:

 

  • PT_DigitalSignature - optional; type PT_DigitalSignature
    • PT_DocumentNo - optional; type PT_DocumentNo - type string with restriction maxLength(20)
    • PT_QRCode - optional; type PT_QRCode - type string with restriction
    • PT_SgntrCertificate - optional; type PT_SgntrCertificate - type string with restriction maxLength(20)
    • PT_SeriesDocumentNumber - optional; type PT_SeriesDocumentNumber - type string with restriction maxLength(70)
    • PT_HashKey - optional; type PT_HashKey - type string with restriction maxLength(7)
    •  

But we must be on the wrong version of SOAP API “CO_EDI_INVOICE_REQUEST_OUT” in S/4, because these segments are not part of the API for us. So now to the question, does anyone know the class methods and/or function modules we can use to obtain this segment information (PT_DigitalSignature+sub elements) information and attach it to the API message? (We have checked the overall note 3154599 and there is nothing relevant for us..). Or if you 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Does SAP CAP (CDS) support Bun.js as runtime instead of Node.js?
entry.content:
Hi CAP team 👋

I’m exploring replacing Node.js with [Bun](https://bun.sh) for performance reasons in a CAP project.

My main question is:
Does SAP CDS / CAP currently support Bun as a runtime?

Also:
- Are there specific runtime dependencies (e.g., decorators, native Node APIs, module resolution) that currently make it incompatible?
- Are there any plans to make CAP compatible with Bun in the future?

I’d love to switch to Bun for better build/startup speed, but want to make sure CAP features like annotations, services, and CDS modeling are supported.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide: Extracting Pegging Data with the New SAP IBP API
entry.content:
Hi Joao, thanks for the answer

We did exactly that a week ago and it works.
The issue was the Version ID, somehow using "__BASELINE" works.

Thank you again for the article which is very useful

entry.title: Supplementary unit qty at 0 for credit memo invoices in intrastat dispatch report
entry.content:
Hello, 

Can someone please tell me why the supplementary unit and net weight fields are null is intrastat dispatch report for a credit memo invoice ? 

I have checked 2839197 - FAQ: Intrastat processing in S/4HANA and it seems to be legal requirement for the net weight since there is a no good movements. But what about supplementary unit ? 

Thanks & regards,

entry.title: How can we send an automatic notification to the customer for an expiring service quotation?
entry.content:
Hello

Does anybody know how we can send an automatic email notification to the customer concerning the expiring service quotation sent?

There is email notification on the approval pending, but nothing concerning a reminder.

Thank you

Ingrid

entry.title: SAC Deployment Package deleted Existing Folders and Reports. Is there a way to retrieve?
entry.content: During Reports and related objects migration from Dev to QA, I accidentally selected the report path which includes folders and reports. After successful deployment all the existing folders and reports were deleted apart from the few which are deployed. Is there a way to restore existing objects (both folders and reports). If not is there any version control available to restore to previous state before deployment

entry.title: Re: Local Client copy error - CL_MDG_TR_CC, CL_FINB_TR_CC
entry.content:
You have to make an RFC Allowlist. 
You can see this under the transaktion sm59 

Choose the time in wich it should be created:

After the allowlist is created you should be able to do the copy!

Greetings

entry.title: Missing fields and changed field names after upgrade from EHP6 to EHP8
entry.content:
There are lot of changes in field names found after upgrade of SAP ECC from EHP6 to EHP8. We are using SAP for retail stores business. Some of field name change are shown below.

Sr. No. Field name in Version - EHP 6               Field name in Version EHP 8
i. Vendor                                                             Supplier
ii. Article                                                              Material
iii. Site                                                                 Plant
iv. Mdse Category                                               Material Group

Also, field Transportation chain which was visible earlier in EHP6 is not visible on screen in Purchase Info records. Transaction - ME11/ME12/ME13.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Cockpit integration suite with internal Serve...
entry.content:
In that case, always try to delete all Browser data. Happened to me as well, got it to work first after deleting All Browser Data. Important: Time range "All time"

History can stay

entry.title: Re: Blog It Forward - Lluis Salvador
entry.content:
You’ve always had the spirit of a Champion, I just gave a little nudge to what was already shining 😍

So proud to see you now as one of our newest Champions, and even prouder of how you’re stepping into SAP Community with full energy, enthusiasm, and a genuine willingness to share.

Can’t wait to see your positive energy light up the whole SAP community!
Keep shining, Lluis!

entry.title: Roadmap for Record/Folder Management vs BTP Document Service vs Opentext ECM
entry.content:
Hi Guru's,

At my company we are investigating optimizing the document management for certain processes. I am looking for more insight and comparison (pro's and cons) between solutions and roadmaps for:

- Record/folder management

- Opentext ECM

- Document Management Service on BTP.

Regards,

Frank

entry.title: Re: Local Client copy error - CL_MDG_TR_CC, CL_FINB_TR_CC
entry.content: This solves this issue! - Another way is to change parameter rfc/callback_security_method

entry.title: Create a SO with item category TAN and TAX and create Invoice
entry.content:
I am creating a Sales Order with "Manage Sales Order - Version 2". Adding a line item with Finished Product Materials, (SO Item Category TAN). Adding another item as Non Stock Material "NS0002", SO item Category (TAX). I am able to create delivery and both the items are shown in Delivery.

I am not able to create a single invoice with both the items. System is allowing to add both the items using Collective invoice, but in that case, more than 1 Sales Order will be created. 

Kindly provide me the solution if this is possible.

entry.title: Re: How to have measures in between dimensions in SAC Table widget?
entry.content:
@William_Yu
For your reference:

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Learning LMS user data import file on...
entry.content: Thanks for the quick response. Highly appreciate it @SF-Dan

entry.title: Split the dunning by type of correspondence
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a new requirement to be able to run the dunning process by type of communication method at customer level.

Currently we have as delivery method Email and Letter, so we would like to separate the Dunning Runs per type of communication at Customer Level?

This is something that can be implemented or is there a solution workaround that can be done allow this requirement?

Thanks and regards

 

Thanks,

 

 

 

PERSON_NAME 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Split the dunning by type of correspondence
entry.content:
Hello!

For your requirement, I recommend utilizing the preselection of business partners feature. This functionality allows you to select specific relevant business partners to be handled in a specific run.

Best regards,
Ronny

entry.title: Subcontracting providing components to the vendor (SD > MM)
entry.content:
have a scenario where:

When a customer requests a sales material X, I provide components X1 and X2 to a subcontractor, who then completes material X and delivers it directly.

How would you resolve this?

I believe the ideal approach is:

  • Creation of a Sales Order with material X.
  • Automatic creation of a Purchase Requisition (PR) with the subcontractor vendor determined automatically.
  • Automatic creation of a Purchase Order (PO) (using RM06BB30) from the PR with the BOM of material X exploded.

Have you implemented something like this? Do you think this is the most appropriate approach? 

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Digital Discovery Assessment - The guided decision between SAP S/4HANA Public or Private Cloud E
entry.content:
Hello @Tobias

 

Thanks for a nice article. I am working on a sample Digital discovery assessment and I have answered all the questions.

However when I want to see the result and proceed ahead I get a hard stop with the below error message.

Is this because it is a sample DDA exercise? On the change log I am able to see that this is approved by Brand guardian. So am I missing some thing here?

Kindly suggest if we are working in right direction before having a discovery session with the customer.

Thanks,

Kartik Shah

entry.title: Re: EC Payroll Archiving
entry.content:
Thanks for bringing this up @ron25

Majority of the customers who moved to EC Payroll 5 to 10 years back are having the above questions due to ever growing DB size.

So far I too haven't found much info in SAP portal on an end to end doc on archiving and purging of data generated in ECP(like time eval and pay results, fi postings) would be keen to know if you manage to get some. In the meanwhile you could explore reading through blogs related to SAP ILM which gives insights to archiving in ECP lined  with internal and external storage systems but many questions still unanswered. I have done some test runs as part of poc but couldn't proceed further due to lack of clarity on the storage options of archived data.

Regarding the employee master data in EC that replicates to ECP you should explore options of purging data in EC based on your org/customer archiving strategy. Historical purged data would automatically be erased from ECP during replication(haven't tested though). Do share your observations if you get some leads on this.

entry.title: Re: Your Web Intelligence idle connection has expired. Close this document and reopen it.
entry.content: Hello Fred4, did you find a solution to this issue? We are facing the same.

entry.title: How to bypass the SAML2 IdP selection screen for SAP NetWeaver ABAP
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to bypass the SAML IDP selection page? 

How do you ensure the SAML2 IDP is automatically selected? 

Thanks and Best Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to bypass the SAML2 IdP selection screen for SAP...
entry.content:
Hi, 

Please refer to the SAP KBA 2673366 for further information on how to set the IDP selection to "Automatic", bypassing the SAML2 IDP selection page. 

BR, 
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Your Web Intelligence idle connection has expired. Close this document and reopen it.
entry.content: Hello Fred4, did you find a solution to this issue? We are facing the same.

entry.title: SuccessFactors LMS
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I have the following question within the LMS: We have recently introduced new task types. Is there a way in the LMS to set the task type for all courses to "empty" without having to go the cumbersome way of having to go into each item? Possibly via BizX property file??? Thanks for any help.

Kind regards, Vero

entry.title: Re: Create a SO with item category TAN and TAX and create Invoice
entry.content: Please, add a tag such as SAP S/4HANA public /or/ private Cloud

entry.title: How to Restrict Access at Product Group Level in Manage Product Master Data App?
entry.content:
We are facing an issue in the Manage Product Master Data app where we are unable to restrict user access based on product group. Users are currently able to view and edit product master data for all product groups.

We are attempting to restrict write access at the product group level in the Manage Product Master Data Fiori app

While configuring the restriction in the "Authorization Group for Product Group" field, we are encountering the following issue : The value help (F4) for Authorization Group for Product Group does not display any available values.

Is "Authorization Group for Product Group" currently supported for access control in the Manage Product Master Data app?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Restrict Access at Product Group Level in Mana...
entry.content:
Please follow the KBA's

 https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2808362 Restriction "Authorization Group for Product Group" ignored when using the App "Manage Product Master Data"
 https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3203535 Not possible to maintain values for restriction types 'Authorization Group for Product' and 'Authorization Group for Product Type'

entry.title: Re: Consume deployed CAP Service from locally running CAP...
entry.content:
Hi, thanks a lot for the quick answer.

Unfortunatly If I use the approuter, It is not possible to bind it to my application.

So the application still uses the Authorization that is configured in the .cdsrc.json File.

How do I use the approuter for the Authentication?

This is my Approuter:

{
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "destination": "srv-api",
      "csrfProtection": true
    }
  ]
}
 
Thanks a lot for your help! 🙂

D Sri Divya

entry.title: Re: Purchasing info record not found in purchasing organi...
entry.content: Hello

entry.title: Re: How to automatically create a Job Information event a...
entry.content:
Hi William,
I have tried several options, but none have worked. Here are my suggestions for a scenario like this:
  • According to SAP Best Practice regarding Garden Leave for a different country, Leave of Absence (LOA) can be a solution. You have tried it already, and it seems to work well. This might be a good option since, technically, the employee is on Leave of Absence throughout the Garden Leave period.
  • I would create an event reason for Garden Leave under the Data Change event, making HR/MSS responsible for creating the event in Job Info according to the Garden Leave Date.
  • Create an event reason for Garden Leave under the Termination event with Employee Status set to "Active" and handle it via the Termination screen.
All of these options require additional actions and efforts from the Manager or HR when Termination and Garden Leave are applicable, but this may ensure that the records are properly tracked. Additionally, the solution needs to be aligned with business needs and processes, which I don't know in detail, so my options are just high-level scenarios.
 
Best regards, 
Nicoleta

entry.title: Incorrect value on F2270 Check Sales Volume APP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I saw this strange behavoir using VA02 and F2270.

I create an order ( order type ZRS that come from standard RS) to manage material return and ( after valuation)  the credit memo.

Based on option available in SAP we use the repairs tab in this way: 

 

All seems to be good except for this point:

If credit memo  is not yet  raised, because we are wating a decision then in the new APP F2270 Check sales volume )  the amount is showed like "Open Billing requestes" instead of  "open Credit meno request"

As conseguence the revenue is incorrect .

What is wrong ? 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Missing fields and changed field names after upgrade...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

what exactly is the question here? Do you complain about the field names changed? Then maybe either using the influence tool to raise this or talk to your account manager who is responsible.

Or does something not work and you wanted to report this? Then also please explain exactly what does not work. This way we can help you.

Remember this is not a ticketing system, so no one will have access or know anything without you telling it. 

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Pick List Date must be between order date and cancellation date
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: How to obtain the required SII certificates from the Spanish Tax Agency
entry.content:
The SII (Immediate Supply of Information) is a system of keeping the VAT registration books directly in the Tax Agency servers by means of  a quasi-immediate submission of the invoice VAT-relevant information.

The SII shall shall be mandatory to the following taxpayers with a monthly VAT clearance period:

  • Taxpayers registered in REDEME (Monthly VAT Return registry)
  • Large Enterprises (turnover greater than €6.010.121.04)
  • VAT Groups
  • Since 01/01/2025, the owners of fiscal warehouses of gasoline, gas oil or biofuel subject to the Hydrocarbon Tax, as well as the extracting companies or professionals
  • Other companies registered voluntarily to SII.

The content of the SII invoicing information message must be submitted in XML format. The submissions may be performed by (1) the taxpayer, (2) a representative thereof for the purposes of this process, or (3) an authorised agent, who must have a recognised electronic certificate. Applications that send information to the Tax Agency web services must be authenticated with the client’s electronic certificate.

In summary, in order to use the Tax Agency SII services, it is required to have a recognised electronic certificate accepted by the Tax Agency installed on the computer from which the information is sent. The certificate may have been issued to a Natural Person or Legal Entity. 

 

How to obtain a digital certificate

Remember that for tax transactions with the Tax Agency, your Certification Authority must be one of those that have been approved, the list of which you will find in the section Organisations that Issue Digital Certificates accredited by the Tax Agency. 

The specific steps to be followed will depend on the Certification Authority that you have chosen to issue your certificate (you might need to consult the web page of the authority that you have chosen).

  • Request of the via Internet certificate.
  • Proof of identity before one of the registration offices established by the Certification Authority. The documentation to provide when verifying your identity will depend on the type of electronic certificate requested.
  • Download of the via Internet certificate.
  • Backup of the certificate.

You can check this video (in spanish):  Como obtener un certificado de la AEAT  or see here for further details.

For example, in the case your certification authority would be the FNMT (Spanish National Mint), then the steps required in order to obtaining a certificate in software format, would be:

  • Go to http://www.cert.fnmt.es/
  • Select Company certificate (Certificado Empresa)
  • Select “company” (Persona Jurídica)

Do all the steps:

  • Preliminary configuration (configuracion previa). Required software installation.
  • Certificate request (solicitar certificado). Upon completion of this step, a request code (código de solicitud) will be received by email. This code will be requested in the identity proof step.
  • Identity Proof (Acreditar identidad), you might choose one of the following mechanisms:
    • Online: only for company codes with Tax ID A, B, C, and D
    • Onsite at Post office.
    • Onsite at an Identity Validation Office, such as:
      • Tax Agency identification office
      • CNMV identification office
      • Navarra  Identification office
    • Certificate Download ( descargar certificado) and payment (price list)

The Root certificates will be needed as well for the system setup, so do not forget to down load them too:

 

The full details of each step can be found in the following links:

  • Information and steps to obtain an electronic certificate
  • How to obtain an electronic certificate
  • How to download or install your electronic certificate
  • How to download the FNMT root certificate
  • How to verify the status of an FNMT or electronic DNI certificate
  • How to make a backup of your electronic certificate
  • How to import a valid copy of your electronic certificate
  • How to set a password for using your electronic certificate
  • Installation of the certificate on another computer or browser
  • How to renew your electronic certificate
  • How to cancel your electronic certificate
  • How to delete an electronic certificate
  • How to suspend an electronic certificate
  • Information on FNMT natural person certificates (AC FNMT Users)
  • Information on new representative certificates (FNMT)
  • Electronic certificates for minors
  • Electronic certificates on Android mobiles
  • Electronic certificates on iOS mobile devices
  • Error 403, SSL connection error, The page cannot be shown or Secure connection failed when accessing or signing a procedure on the internet

 

Tax agency technical support

In case of questions it is possible to access the Tax Agency in the following link:

https://sede.agenciatributaria.gob.es/Sede/ayuda/firma-digital-sistema-clave-pin-tecnica.html

 

 

Open the link Asistencia para soporte técnico

 

Tax Id Number and Name are required to submit any question.

SAP  links

  • Spain SII Setting Up SAP Integration Suite (SAP S/4HANA Cloud) - Neo
  • Spain SII Setting Up SAP Integration Suite (SAP S/4HANA Cloud) - Cloud Foundry
  • SAP Note 2469460 - Key-store management in SAP Cloud Platform Integration for process services
  • Blog: Cloud Integration - Keystore Monitor now available for Tenant Administrator
    Blog: Cloud Integration - How to Setup Secure Outbound HTTP Connection using Keystore Monitor
  • Blog: Get the Certificates right when integrating Electronic Tax Register Books for Spain Cloud Integration.

entry.title: Re: Unable to execute Adaptation Project from WebIde
entry.content: no one can help, so you can only provide these much. ask yourself what we can do?

entry.title: Re: Pick List Date must be between order date and cancell...
entry.content:
HI,

In my case, my current SO is not cancelled neither its Cancellation date is having a date. Nevertheless, the pick list is displaying this error message when creating it. 

As a workaround, I forced a date in cancellation date in the SO document. Finally got my pick list updated successfully.✔️ 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: How to have measures in between dimensions in SAC Tab...
entry.content: No, that's not supported by SAC table.

entry.title: Re: Gurugram Stammtisch: Invitation to SAP Community Members for Stammtisch at DLF Cyber Hub, Gurugr
entry.content: Looking forward to this event !

entry.title: Project cost vs payroll posting in professional services projects
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I have a question regarding how standard Consulting GL account should look both in P&L and in Project Profitabilty and if that is enough or not coming from Professional Services projects. I am curious if it correct and this how it should behave or are we missing something. Also I am curious how payroll postings would impact these(more on that under the pictures) This moment I have these:

In Project profitability:

In P&L:

and the total for all the postings of the consulting gl looks like this:

and here is one of those journal entry for this:

Concerning the payroll can anyone tell how would this lok or affect what we already have based on this:

  • A consultant works 160 hours in April on Project CNS1 (WBS1), recorded at 10 EUR/hour via timesheet → this posts 1,600 EUR to the project.

  • Payroll is run at month-end and generates actual costs of 1,605 EUR, split into:

    • Payroll Expense (61100000): 1,405 EUR

    • Social Security (61201000): 200 EUR

    • Liabilities: 21501000, 21502000, 21503000

We want the actual payroll cost (1,605 EUR) to be reflected against the project/WBS (not just the 1,600 EUR from timesheet), impacting project profitability and P&L correctly.

Questions:

  1. How can the payroll posting be linked to the project and WBS?

  2. If not possible directly, is it standard to post a manual journal:

    • Credit a payroll offset GL (new account)

    • Debit a COS account assigned to the project/WBS?

  3. How is the under/over-realization (in this case, 5 EUR) typically handled in S/4HANA?

  4. What is best practice for basing revenue on the actual payroll cost instead of time postings?

Thank you in advance

Levente

entry.title: Re: How to obtain the required SII certificates from the Spanish Tax Agency
entry.content: DISCLAIMER. The links in the blog are external, so they may be modified at any time externally by the Tax Agency or the Spanish National Mint without previous notice.

entry.title: Change formatting for Footer information via Manage Text
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are using Manage Text in S/4HANA Public Cloud to manage the information displayed in the Footer of the master template. There we show multiple lines of text and we would like some of the text to be formatted in bold.

Is it possible to add html tags or other formatting options via the app Manage Text?

Thanks

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Become an active member!!
entry.content: I am currently in an admin role with Xcel Energy

entry.title: Asset Accounting - What is ECC t-code ABSK in S/4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am working for a client who is transforming from ECC to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This asset topic is related to retirement with revenue and not integrated with Accounts Receivable (Local GAAP for Finland)

Our client has in ECC been using transaction ABSK, to achieve that the revenue part is being reposted from Gain from asset transactions account to depreciation difference account. 

Now in S/4 Public  cloud, the revenue part of the asset sales is posted to gain and loss to accounts defined in KTMEHR (for gain) and KTMIND (for loss). This is however not correct yet from accounting point of view. The revenue part should eventually hit the depreciation difference account, so that the P&L impact is zero for the company, but how can this be achieved in S/4 Public cloud?

I can google transaction types 200 (loss) and 210 (gain), but I cannot find those in particular in any of the posting menus. 

Hopefully somebody can help?

Thanks and Br,

-me-

entry.title: Re: Inactive Objects to be maintained from SU24 without d...
entry.content: I think the correct answer here is to use SU24 variants, this would be the best way to achieve what you need to achieve in a standard manner. Please mark this as closed.

entry.title: Re: Automated Update of open Sales Orders in case of Avai...

However we are also using ABC functionality in some of our BOPs where it seems not to work correctly and not exclusively selects Material/Plant combinations which are stored in ACL. Do you have any Information here?

entry.title: Re: Create a SO with item category TAN and TAX and create...
entry.content: It is Public Cloud Raymond. I checked Split Analysis. this is not happening.
